name: CUT&RUN (Cleavage Under Targets and Release Using Nuclease)
nameCn: CUT&RUN 染色质靶向切割技术

components.name: 1. Harvest 5×10⁵–5×10⁶ cells (no crosslinking); pellet 600×g 3 min RT

note.en: Native conditions — no formaldehyde. Fresh or cryopreserved cells both OK. Low input possible (~5,000 cells).
note.zh: 天然条件——无需甲醛交联。新鲜或冻存细胞均可。最低 ~5,000 细胞。

components.name: 2. Wash 2× with Wash Buffer (20 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 150 mM NaCl, 0.5 mM spermidine, protease inhibitors)

note.en: 600×g 3 min RT. Keep cells at RT (not ice) at this stage.
note.zh: 600×g 3 min RT。此阶段保持 RT（非冰上）。

components.name: 3. Bind cells to ConA magnetic beads: 10 µL beads/5×10⁵ cells, RT 10 min, rotate

note.en: Bangs Labs BioMag ConA beads. Magnetically capture cells in subsequent steps.
note.zh: Bangs Labs BioMag ConA 磁珠。后续步骤磁性捕获细胞。

components.name: 4. Permeabilize: add 0.01% digitonin in Wash Buffer, 5 min RT

note.en: Digitonin permeabilizes plasma membrane; nuclear envelope stays intact (unlike NP-40 or Triton X-100).
note.zh: Digitonin 透化细胞膜，核膜保持完整（区别于 NP-40 / Triton X-100）。

components.name: 5. Primary antibody: 1 µg/rxn in Antibody Buffer (Wash + 0.01% digitonin + 2 mM EDTA), 4°C 2 h or overnight

note.en: EDTA prevents premature MNase cleavage. Use ChIP-grade validated Ab. Controls: IgG neg, H3K4me3 pos.
note.zh: EDTA 防止 MNase 提前切割。用 ChIP-grade 验证抗体。对照：IgG 阴性，H3K4me3 阳性。

components.name: 6. Wash 2× Dig-Wash (Wash + 0.01% digitonin); remove unbound Ab
7. Bind pA-MNase (700 ng/mL) in Dig-Wash, 4°C 1 h

note.en: For mouse primary Ab: use pA/G-MNase or bridge anti-mouse secondary.
note.zh: 小鼠一抗需用 pA/G-MNase 或桥接抗小鼠二抗。

components.name: 9. Activate MNase: add 2 mM CaCl₂, incubate 0°C ice-water bath 30 min

note.en: Ca²⁺ activates MNase → targeted DNA cleavage. 0°C is critical for controlled digestion. Longer = smaller fragments.
note.zh: Ca²⁺ 激活 MNase → 靶向 DNA 切割。0°C 是控制消化的关键。时间越长片段越小。

components.name: 10. Stop: add STOP Buffer (340 mM NaCl, 20 mM EDTA, 4 mM EGTA, 0.01% digitonin, RNase A 0.05 mg/mL, spike-in 25 pg/mL)

note.en: EDTA/EGTA chelates Ca²⁺. E. coli spike-in DNA for normalization (optional).
note.zh: EDTA/EGTA 螯合 Ca²⁺ 终止反应。E. coli spike-in DNA 用于标准化（可选）。

note.en: Cut fragments diffuse out of nuclei.
note.zh: 切割片段从核内扩散到上清。
沉淀 = 未切割染色质。

components.name: 13. DNA extraction: 0.1% SDS + Proteinase K 100 µg/mL, 50°C 1 h; SPRI beads or column cleanup

note.en: Elute in 20–50 µL TE or ddH₂O.
note.zh: 20–50 µL TE 或 ddH₂O 洗脱。

components.name: 14. Library prep for sequencing or qPCR validation

note.en: Bioanalyzer: expect mono/dinucleosome (150/300 bp). NEBNext Ultra II; 10–14 cycles PCR amplification.
note.zh: Bioanalyzer：预期单/双核小体模式（150/300 bp）。NEBNext Ultra II 建库；PCR 10–14 个循环。

notes.en: Advantages over ChIP: no crosslinking artifacts, very low background, works with ≥500 cells, no sonication. Key: 0.01% digitonin only (not Triton), MNase at 0°C. Validate new antibodies with known marks (H3K4me3, H3K27ac) first.
notes.zh: 相比 ChIP 优势：无交联伪影、极低背景、≥500 细胞即可、无需超声。关键：仅用 0.01% digitonin（非 Triton）；MNase 在 0°C 激活。新抗体先用已知修饰（H3K4me3、H3K27ac）验证。

ref: Skene & Henikoff (2017) eLife 6:e21856; Meers et al. (2019) eLife 8:e46314; Kaya-Okur et al. (2019) Nat Commun 10:1930

usage.en: Profile histone modifications and transcription factor binding using CUT&RUN (cleavage under targets and release using nuclease).
usage.zh: CUT&RUN 技术分析组蛋白修饰和转录因子结合谱。

briefSteps.en: Harvest cells (no crosslinking) → bind to ConA magnetic beads → permeabilize with 0.01% digitonin → incubate with primary antibody (4°C, overnight) → wash → bind pA-MNase (4°C, 1 h) → wash → activate MNase with 2 mM CaCl₂ at 0°C (30 min) → stop with EDTA/EGTA buffer → release fragments at 37°C (30 min) → collect supernatant → extract DNA → library prep or qPCR
briefSteps.zh: 收取细胞（无需交联）→ 结合 ConA 磁珠 → 0.01% digitonin 透化 → 一抗孵育（4°C 过夜）→ 洗涤 → pA-MNase 结合（4°C 1 h）→ 洗涤 → 2 mM CaCl₂ 在 0°C 激活 MNase（30 min）→ EDTA/EGTA 终止 → 37°C 释放片段（30 min）→ 收上清 → DNA 提取 → 文库制备或 qPCR

detailedSteps.en: Day 1: Cell Binding and Antibody Incubation
detailedSteps.zh: 第1天：细胞结合与抗体孵育

detailedSteps.en: Harvest 500,000 cells (range 5,000–5,000,000); no crosslinking required. Pellet at 600×g for 3 min at RT. Wash 2× with Wash Buffer (20 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 150 mM NaCl, 0.5 mM spermidine, 1× protease inhibitors).
detailedSteps.zh: 收取 500,000 个细胞（范围 5,000–5,000,000），无需甲醛交联。600×g RT 离心 3 min，用洗涤缓冲液（20 mM HEPES pH 7.5、150 mM NaCl、0.5 mM 亚精胺、1× 蛋白酶抑制剂）洗涤 2 次。

detailedSteps.en: Activate ConA beads: wash with PBS + 0.1% BSA; resuspend to 10 µL per 500,000 cells. Add cells to beads and rotate 10 min at RT. Magnetically capture beads in all subsequent steps.
detailedSteps.zh: 活化 ConA 磁珠：用 PBS + 0.1% BSA 洗涤，每 500,000 个细胞用 10 µL 重悬。加入细胞，室温旋转 10 min。后续步骤均通过磁力架捕获磁珠。

detailedSteps.en: Permeabilize: resuspend bead-bound cells in 1 mL Dig-Wash Buffer (Wash Buffer + 0.01% digitonin); rotate 5 min at RT. Capture beads and discard supernatant.
detailedSteps.zh: 透化：将磁珠结合细胞重悬于 1 mL Dig-Wash 缓冲液（洗涤缓冲液 + 0.01% digitonin），RT 旋转 5 min。磁力捕获，弃上清。

detailedSteps.en: Add primary antibody (1 µg) diluted in 100 µL Antibody Buffer (Dig-Wash + 2 mM EDTA); rotate at 4°C overnight (minimum 2 h). EDTA prevents premature MNase activation. Include IgG negative and H3K4me3 positive controls.
detailedSteps.zh: 将 1 µg 一抗稀释于 100 µL 抗体缓冲液（Dig-Wash + 2 mM EDTA）中，4°C 旋转孵育过夜（至少 2 h）。EDTA 防止 MNase 提前激活。设 IgG 阴性对照和 H3K4me3 阳性对照。

detailedSteps.en: Day 2: pA-MNase Binding, Cleavage, and DNA Extraction
detailedSteps.zh: 第2天：pA-MNase 结合、切割与DNA提取

detailedSteps.en: Capture beads; wash 2× with Dig-Wash Buffer (600×g, 3 min, 4°C). Add pA-MNase (protein A–MNase fusion) at 700 ng/mL in 100 µL Dig-Wash; rotate 1 h at 4°C. Note: use pA/G-MNase for mouse primary antibodies.
detailedSteps.zh: 磁力捕获，Dig-Wash 洗涤 2 次（600×g，3 min，4°C）。加入 pA-MNase（蛋白 A–MNase 融合蛋白），700 ng/mL，100 µL Dig-Wash，4°C 旋转孵育 1 h。小鼠一抗需用 pA/G-MNase。

detailedSteps.en: Wash 2× with Dig-Wash Buffer to remove unbound pA-MNase. Resuspend in 100 µL Dig-Wash and place tubes in ice-water bath (0°C).
detailedSteps.zh: Dig-Wash 洗涤 2 次，去除未结合 pA-MNase。重悬于 100 µL Dig-Wash，置于冰水浴（0°C）。

detailedSteps.en: Activate MNase: add CaCl₂ to 2 mM final concentration. Incubate at 0°C (ice-water bath) for exactly 30 min. The 0°C temperature is critical for controlled, targeted cleavage.
detailedSteps.zh: 激活 MNase：加入 CaCl₂ 至终浓度 2 mM，在 0°C 冰水浴中准确孵育 30 min。0°C 是控制靶向切割的关键条件。

detailedSteps.en: Stop reaction by adding 100 µL 2× STOP Buffer (340 mM NaCl, 20 mM EDTA, 4 mM EGTA, 0.01% digitonin, 0.05 mg/mL RNase A, 25 pg/mL spike-in E. coli DNA). Mix by inversion.
detailedSteps.zh: 加入 100 µL 2× STOP 缓冲液（340 mM NaCl、20 mM EDTA、4 mM EGTA、0.01% digitonin、0.05 mg/mL RNase A、25 pg/mL E. coli spike-in DNA）终止反应，翻转混匀。

detailedSteps.en: Release fragmented chromatin: incubate at 37°C for 30 min with gentle mixing (300 rpm). Cut DNA fragments diffuse out of nuclei into supernatant.
detailedSteps.zh: 释放切割片段：37°C 轻摇孵育 30 min（300 rpm）。切割的 DNA 片段从细胞核扩散至上清。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 16,000×g for 5 min at 4°C; carefully transfer supernatant (released DNA) to a new tube. Pellet = remaining uncut chromatin (discard).
detailedSteps.zh: 16,000×g 4°C 离心 5 min，小心转移上清（含释放 DNA）至新管。沉淀为未切割染色质（弃去）。

detailedSteps.en: Extract DNA: add SDS to 0.1% and Proteinase K to 100 µg/mL; incubate 50°C for 1 h. Purify with SPRI beads (1.2×) or column; elute in 20–50 µL TE or water. Quantify by Qubit.
detailedSteps.zh: DNA 提取：加 SDS 至 0.1%，Proteinase K 至 100 µg/mL，50°C 孵育 1 h。SPRI 磁珠（1.2×）或柱纯化，洗脱至 20–50 µL TE 或水。Qubit 定量。

detailedSteps.en: Validate by qPCR (target locus vs. IgG and negative-locus controls) or proceed to library preparation (NEBNext Ultra II, 10–14 PCR cycles). Bioanalyzer should show mono/dinucleosome peaks at ~150/300 bp.
detailedSteps.zh: qPCR 验证（目标位点 vs. IgG 及阴性位点对照），或直接进行文库制备（NEBNext Ultra II，10–14 个 PCR 循环）。Bioanalyzer 应呈单/双核小体峰（~150/300 bp）。

note.en: After overnight antibody incubation, beads can be held at 4°C for up to 2 h before proceeding to pA-MNase binding.
note.zh: 一抗孵育过夜后，磁珠可在 4°C 保存最多 2 h，再进行 pA-MNase 结合步骤。

note.en: Extracted and purified DNA can be stored at −20°C for up to 6 months before library preparation or qPCR.
note.zh: 提取纯化后的 DNA 可 −20°C 保存最长 6 个月，待文库制备或 qPCR。
